name: crytop
description: A simple encryption tool powered by Web Crypto API

scripts.prepack: node scripts/setversion.js up && npm start && node scripts/setversion.js down
scripts.start:main: tsc -d -m umd --outDir dist && node scripts/fixumd.js dist/index.js
scripts.start:module: tsc -m esnext && mv src/index.js dist/index.esm.js && cp dist/index.d.ts dist/index.esm.d.ts
scripts.start: npm run start:main && npm run start:module

author: lamartinecabral
